name: esp32c5_suite_ext3
notes: Full 12-test hardware suite for ESP32-C5 dual-USB devkit. Requires 6 jumpers: GPIO2‚ÜîGPIO3 (PCNT+INTR), GPIO4‚ÜîGPIO5 (UART1), GPIO6‚ÜíGPIO1 (ADC), GPIO7‚ÜîGPIO9 (SPI MOSI‚ÜîMISO), GPIO8‚ÜîGPIO14 (I2C SDA), GPIO13‚ÜîGPIO23 (I2C SCL). Flash port: native USB (MAC=3C:DC:75:84:A6:54). Console port: CH341 UART0 bridge (serial=5AAF278818). I2C uses V2 slave driver + bit-bang master at 10kHz to work around ESP32-C5 single HP I2C port limitation.

required.label: Wire 1 ‚Äî PCNT pulse out + GPIO interrupt in
Wire 2 ‚Äî UART1 TX ‚Üí UART1 RX loopback
Wire 5 ‚Äî I2C bit-bang SDA ‚Üî HW slave SDA
Wire 6 ‚Äî I2C bit-bang SCL ‚Üî HW slave SCL
